name: Bolt of Lightfire ~SSEC~
description:
Bolt Lightfire, the first leader of the Brotherhoods I'll make.
Mmm, Free MusicMania Tag :P

(SideNote: I was really thinking of using the main art for each character, but uh... that's boring. I'm just picking the pictures from different time frame :3)

(SideSIDENote: Treacherous news just dropped, I'm finally reading On Borrowed Time again, that's awful news btw. Trust me, you do not want to see me get back into a certain series, I will fucking adore it for like half of the year or more. But uh, if I do finish reading it, and ATTEMPT to find permissions from Woo and there's nothing against bots... you already know.)

(SideSIDESIDE Note: I can do it. There's nothing stopping be, except credits ofc. BUT I CAN DO IT. SSEC CAN WAIT, HELLO OBT!!)


I Do Not Own SSEC All Character's and Art come from Scruffyeevee not me, if asked, I will remove these characters. I am only doing this because I felt just a lil bit disappointed there weren't SSEC character's here :/.
